narrative:
Delta Three (precinct in Fulton County) has 895 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a clear Republican lean of 10.8 percentage points.
